Botulax 100 Units

Premium quality botulinum toxin type A from South Korea. Designed for clinical efficacy and precise results in aesthetic procedures.

Quick Specifications

  • Manufacturer Hugel
  • Active Ingredient Clostridium botulinum toxin type A
  • Storage 2°C to 8°C

Technical Specifications

Name Botulax 100 Units
Brand Botulax
Manufacturer Hugel Inc.
Origin South Korea
Unit Size 100 Units / vial
Appearance White to yellowish lyophilized powder in a colorless transparent vial.

description Overview

Botulax 100 Units is presented here for B2B catalog reference, procurement review, and product identification. Always consult official manufacturer documentation and local regulatory requirements before professional handling.

inventory_2 Storage & Shipping

Temperature-sensitive product. Storage and handling requirements must be verified against official manufacturer documentation and destination-country regulations before procurement.

local_shipping

Shipped via expedited cold-chain logistics to maintain temperature integrity during transit.

warning

Professional Use Only

This product is presented for B2B catalog and wholesale inquiry purposes only. Eligibility, import rules, storage requirements, and professional-use restrictions may vary by country.

description
